title: [BUG]The internal hyperlink is not working well. I'm macOS M1
author: superxiaoao
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: X.Y.Z

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const homeIndexWorksheet = workbook.getWorksheet('首页目录');
let sheetNameArr = ['Sheet1','Sheet2','map']
    for(let t =0;t < sheetNameArr.length;t++){
      homeIndexWorksheet.getCell('A'+ Number(3 + t)).value = t+1
      homeIndexWorksheet.getCell('B'+ Number(3 + t)).value = { text: 'test', hyperlink: '#\'map\'!A1'}
      
    }
```

## The expected behaviour:
I now show that the specified file cannot be opened ，I need to export the internal hyperlink to work

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript

```

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body: @superxiaoao 这个问题跟 #1676 是一样的哦! 目前这个问题已经被修复了,等下一个NPM版本发布后的时候,就没问题了.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @superxiaoao 如果是WPS的话，还是会有这个问题，可以来这里看下，这里已经修复了 #https://github.com/zurmokeeper/excelize/pull/5
